---
description: "Use when editing landing page, setup docs, architecture docs, AI integration docs, or VitePress configuration."
applyTo: "apps/web/arcdrop-docs/**, **/*.md"
---

# ArcDrop Documentation Rules

- Documentation is a release artifact, not optional follow-up work.
- Keep quickstart steps executable on a clean machine.
- Align docs with current folder layout and deployment commands.

## Required Docs For Feature Completion

- Setup or runbook update when deploy behavior changes.
- Architecture note update when boundaries or dependencies change.
- AI usage update when provider config or workflows change.

## Quality Rules

- Prefer concrete commands and expected outputs over abstract prose.
- Include troubleshooting notes for known failure modes.
- Keep terms consistent with PRD and roadmap IDs.
- All documentation and UI copy in docs pages must be English-only.
- Code snippets and inline comments in docs must be English and explanatory.
